examples: "Tha'll see him often enow after a bit," answered Dickon.
Th' sermon was good enow—but I'm bound to get out afore th' collection.
Layin' tha' badness on a robin—not but what he's impidint enow for anythin'.
"We lost to a great side, we had a game plan but when our centre defender was injured everything fell apart, " a chastised Cameroon assistant coach, Enow Ngacha, told BBC Sport.
